items.title: Source: Barça contact Atléti about Álvarez move
items.summary: Barcelona have initiated contact with Atlético Madrid to find out the club's stance over the possible transfer of striker Julián Álvarez this summer, a source confirmed to ESPN.

items.title: Sources: Madrid's Mbappé a doubt for Clásico
items.summary: Real Madrid on Monday confirmed that France star Kylian Mbappe has a left hamstring injury of his semitendinosus muscle.

items.title: Pulisic goalless streak hits 16, tying career worst
items.summary: Christian Pulisic equaled his worst goalless streak after he was unable to find the back of the net in AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus on Sunday.

items.title: Spurs' Simons ruled out for season, to miss WC
items.summary: Tottenham forward Xavi Simons will play no further part this season and miss the World Cup this summer after a suspected anterior cruciate ligament injury in Spurs' win over Wolves.

items.title: Drie tactische dingen om op te letten tijdens PSG - Bayern München
items.summary: De twee meest aantrekkelijk voetballende teams van deze Champions League-campagne gaan het in een titanenduel tegen elkaar opnemen. Paris Saint-Germain en Bayern München treffen elkaar in de halve finale van de Champions League. Dit affiche vraagt uiteraard om voorbereiding. Drie tactische dingen om op te letten tijdens de eerste halve finale.

items.title: Four ways to tackle football's frustrating 'tactical time-out'
items.summary: Next season, leagues will be allowed to select from a series of trials to try to stop the goalkeeper tactical time-out. BBC Sport looks at the proposals.

items.title: 'Schrik voor AC Milan en Kroatië: einde seizoen Modric'
items.summary: De schrik zit er even goed in bij AC Milan en Kroatië: Luka Modric is geblesseerd geraakt en komt dit seizoen niet meer in actie. Het WK zou níet in gevaar zijn.

items.title: Update over blessure Paz zorgt voor opluchting in Argentinië
items.summary: Nico Paz is snel weer inzetbaar voor Como en zijn deelname aan het WK is niet in gevaar. Dat is de conclusie na verder onderzoek naar de ernst van de hoofdblessure die het 21-jarige toptalent opliep in de uitwedstrijd tegen Genoa.

items.title: Should Man United stick with Carrick, or go all out for PSG's Luis Enrique?
items.summary: Manchester United have settled on two candidates for the permanent manager's job at Old Trafford: Michael Carrick or a unicorn.

items.title: 'Aké zal vertrekken bij Man City', Guti geen voorstander van terugkeer Mourinho
items.summary: We zitten in een periode tussen twee transferwindows, maar de stroom aan transfernieuws houdt nooit op. Traditiegetrouw volgt Voetbal International de buitenlandse markt op de voet. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Staflid van Getafe deelt hoe AI nummer zes van Spanje enorm vooruit helpt
items.summary: Sceptici zullen de frustratie voelen opborrelen als ze dit seizoen beelden zien van de dug-out van Getafe, waar steevast naar drie tablets gekeken wordt. De tablets staan symbool voor de moderne koers die de huidige nummer zes van La Liga is gaan varen. Een lid uit de technische staf van coach José Bordalás (foto) heeft er het een en ander over prijsgegeven.

items.title: Could Newcastle get dragged into relegation fight?
items.summary: Newcastle have lost their past five games in all competitions and are eight points clear of the Premier League bottom three.

items.title: WCL and WSL talking points: Arsenal show super strength but Manchester pair stumble
items.summary: Barça’s need to adapt on show in Bayern draw, while Sam Kerr’s ‘perfect hat-trick’ is denied by a lack of technology Alexia Putellas said Barcelona have to “adapt our game” after a 1-1 draw away to Bayern Munich in the first leg of the Champions League semi-finals. The game, in which the scorer of Bayern’s equaliser, Franziska Kett, was sent off for pulling Salma Paralluelo’s hair late on, was a far cry from the 7-1 victory the Spanish champions earned over the German champions in their opening match of the league phase of the competition. “We knew this game would be different. As you’ve seen, we were right,” said the two-time Ballon d’Or winner. “The first half was different from the second half. In the end, they were in a medium block; we waited for more space in the middle. We have to adapt our game.” The key seems to be to let Barcelona have the ball and Bayern’s Giulia Gwinn said: “The biggest challenge against Barcelona is to accept that you’ll have very little possession without becoming passive. Every time we managed to go beyond that initial moment of pressing, we were dangerous. In the second half, we had the momentum. We could’ve made more of a couple of chances, but we could tell that they’re not unbeatable, that we can get something done.” Suzanne Wrack Continue reading...

items.title: Brilliant Bayern’s wild comeback typifies the Kompany method perfectly | Andy Brassell
items.summary: Vincent Kompany’s team demand more of themselves than ever before. Next up: a huge test against PSG “You’re hopelessly behind, you know there’s a big game in Paris on Tuesday. But that doesn’t matter. This game in Mainz is what counts. The coach finds the right words and the team reacts.” Bayern Munich hope that there will be games to come which define their campaign more than a straightforward win – statistically speaking – in a Bundesliga game with the title of champions already done and dusted. Yet Max Eberl was right. In terms of finding the kernel of what has already made Bayern’s season an extraordinary one, of what might yet make it an exceptional one, this really meant something. Absorbed on paper, from a distance, it could be mistaken for more grist to the mill of uncommon numbers; keeping alive the possibility of a joint best-ever Bundesliga season in terms of points, and extending the record goalscoring season in the league campaign to a barely-believable 113 from 31 matches. Continue reading...

items.title: Spurs' Simons to miss rest of season and World Cup
items.summary: Tottenham and Netherlands attacking midfielder Xavi Simons is "heartbroken" to have injured his anterior cruciate ligament.

items.title: Scott Parker’s future as Burnley manager in the balance after relegation to Championship
items.summary: Manager to hold talks with Burnley’s chair, Alan Pace Parker may seek amicable parting with year on his deal Scott Parker’s future as the Burnley manager is in the balance after the club’s relegation, with discussions between the 45-year-old and Alan Pace, the chair, expected to determine whether he will remain in place for next season. No decision has been made and it is understood that Parker is unsure whether to continue and may seek an amicable parting with one year on his contract. Continue reading...

items.title: Could a Premier League club lose their European place once again?
items.summary: After Crystal Palace's issues last season, could a Premier League club lose their European place once again because of dual ownership issues?

items.title: Missy Bo Kearns says Aston Villa doctors probably saved her life after miscarriage
items.summary: Midfielder went through ‘four days of hell in hospital’ Hopes her talking will stop others ‘suffering in silence’ Missy Bo Kearns has described experiencing “a different type of grief” after having a miscarriage last month. The Aston Villa and England midfielder had announced her pregnancy just over two weeks before sharing the tragic loss of her and her partner Liam Walsh’s baby. Speaking to ITV News, the 25-year-old said she thought she was experiencing symptoms from the pregnancy on 18 March when she was shaking and had a temperature of 42C but the Aston Villa team doctor, Dr Jodie Blackadder-Weinstein, told her she needed to call Walsh and get to hospital. Continue reading...

items.title: Premier League and FA Cup semi-finals: 10 talking points from the weekend’s action
items.summary: Sánchez plays long game for McFarlane, Southampton can take heart, Arteta tries to gain edge and Isak will come good One moment from their FA Cup semi-final to Chelsea will haunt Leeds. When Tosin Adarabioyo stretched for a through ball and couldn’t quite get there, quarter of an hour in, everything seemed to slow down. There was Brenden Aaronson with just Robert Sánchez to beat, with the chance to put Leeds ahead against a side that hadn’t scored in five Premier League games and had seemingly lost all confidence. Even at the time it felt a huge moment. The US international didn’t do much wrong, but Sánchez made a fine save with his foot. That, it turned out, was the game. There were other opportunities – most notably Anton Stach’s drive that Sánchez saved spectacularly and the Dominic Calvert-Lewin header just after that, aimed straight at the keeper. They came after Chelsea had taken the lead and the emotional tone was set, though. Sometimes one chance can define a game. Jonathan Wilson FA Cup semi-final report: Chelsea 1-0 Leeds Jonathan Wilson: Chelsea chaos theory delivers another trophy chance FA Cup semi-final report: Manchester City 2-1 Southampton Continue reading...

items.title: Making history and facing Neymar - Lingard on life in Brazil
items.summary: In his first major interview since moving to Brazil, Jesse Lingard talks to the BBC about his new life, and Manchester United.

items.title: Spionage en een dreigend ontslag: Tedesco ontploft helemaal op persconferentie bij Fenerbahçe
items.summary: Gisterenavond vond de wedstrijd plaats waar heel Turkije naar uitkeek. Fenerbahçe, getraind door Domenico Tedesco, ging met 3-0 onderuit op het veld van Galatasaray.

items.title: Énorme coup dur pour les Pays-Bas : un cadre s'est blessé et n'ira pas à la Coupe du monde
items.summary: Xavi Simons manquera la Coupe du monde 2026 cet été. Le Néerlandais s'est gravement blessé le week-end dernier.

items.title: Rik Verheye heeft goed nieuws over het licentiedossier van Sporting Hasselt
items.summary: Sporting Hasselt kroonde zich zondagavond tot kampioen in 1e Amateur, maar naast het sportieve feest blijft vooral de licentiezaak hét gespreksonderwerp. Voorzitter Rik Verheye blijft echter opvallend rustig onder de situatie.

items.title: Anderlecht dreigt Sardella even kwijt te zijn na rode kaart in derby: bondsparket is wel heel streng
items.summary: Anderlecht beleefde zondag een pijnlijke derby tegen Union SG en moet nu vrezen voor extra schade. Killian Sardella kijkt na zijn rode kaart namelijk ook aan tegen een stevige sanctie.

items.title: "J'aime particulièrement les entraîneurs comme lui" : les louanges de Luis Enrique sur Vincent Kompany
items.summary: Luis Enrique s'est exprimé sur Vincent Kompany en conférence de presse avant le choc entre le PSG et le Bayern de ce mardi soir. Il s'est montré élogieux.

items.title: Absent jusqu'en fin de saison ? Le Real Madrid donne des nouvelles de Kylian Mbappé
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé souffre d'une blessure musculaire. Sa disponibilité pour le Clasico et sa fin de saison restent pour l'instant incertaines.

items.title: Barcelona, Chelsea en Arsenal: Mika Godts lokt Europese topclubs naar Amsterdam met oog op toptransfer
items.summary: Mika Godts blijft zich nadrukkelijk in de kijker spelen bij Ajax en lijkt stilaan klaar voor een absolute toptransfer. Zaterdag krijgt de jonge Belg daar opnieuw een uitgelezen kans voor, met grote scouts op de tribune.

items.title: La RAAL peut vivre une saison 2026-2027 "à la Dender" : il faut se réveiller à La Louvière
items.summary: La RAAL s'est maintenue en Jupiler Pro League, mais peut se féliciter que le FCV Dender ait vécu une saison catastrophique et ait réagi trop tard. Car ces Loups-là ont la tête d'une équipe qui pourrait bien galérer la saison prochaine.

items.title: Jens Petter Hauge: van flop bij KAA Gent tot een ster in de Champions League
items.summary: De naam Jens Petter Hauge kent u ongetwijfeld nog. De 26-jarige Noor beleefde een weinig succesvolle passage bij KAA Gent, maar groeide dit seizoen uit tot een van de sterren in de Champions League. Wij nemen zijn opvallende parcours onder de loep.

items.title: Vincent Kompany, futur entraîneur de Manchester City ? "Je suis très détendu à ce sujet"
items.summary: Vincent Kompany rejoindra-t-il un jour Manchester City en tant qu'entraîneur ? C'est bien possible, mais ce ne sera pas pour tout de suite, comme a tenu à le souligner la légende du football allemand Karl-Heinz Rummenigge.
